{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/55534535?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesanjok/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesanjok/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesanjok/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesanjok/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/thesanjok", "id": 55534535, "login": "thesanjok", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU1NTM0NTM1", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesanjok/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesanjok/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesanjok/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesanjok/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesanjok/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/thesanjok", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-32108", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "There was a missing permission-check in the shares feature (the `shr` global-option).

This vulnerability only applies in the following scenario:
* The [shares](https://github.com/9001/copyparty/#shares) feature is used for the specific purpose of creating a share of just a single file inside a folder
* Either the FTP or SFTP server is enabled, and also made publically accessible
  * If a share is password-protected, then SFTP was not vulnerable unless the `sftp-pw` global-option was also enabled

Given these conditions, when a user is browsing a share through either FTP or SFTP (not http or https), they can gain read-access to the remaining files inside the shared folder by guessing/bruteforcing the filenames.

It was not possible to descend into subdirectories in this manner; only the sibling files were accessible.

This issue did not affect filekeys or dirkeys.

This vulnerability is [CVE-2025-58753](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-58753) which was previously fixed for HTTP and HTTPS, but not for FTP. The FTPS server did not yet exist at that time.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00274, "percentile": 0.18987}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-67rw-2x62-mqqm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-12T14:22:46Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-67rw-2x62-mqqm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-67rw-2x62-mqqm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-32108"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-11T21:16:16Z", "published_at": "2026-03-12T14:22:46Z", "references": ["https://github.com/9001/copyparty/security/advisories/GHSA-67rw-2x62-mqqm", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32108", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/copyparty/PYSEC-2026-31.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-67rw-2x62-mqqm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/9001/copyparty/security-advisories/GHSA-67rw-2x62-mqqm", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/9001/copyparty", "summary": "Copyparty ftp/sftp: Sharing a single file did not fully restrict source-folder access", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T17:51:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-67rw-2x62-mqqm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.20.12", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "copyparty"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.20.12"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Copyparty ftp/sftp: Sharing a single file did not fully restrict source-folder access
